label: canonical-config-diff
stdout:
diff --git a/config.yml b/config.yml
index a742a78..8085592 100644
--- a/config.yml
+++ b/config.yml
@@ -28,6 +28,7 @@ models:
         tokenizer_path: "${PROJECT_ROOT}/models/baseline/Qwen3-4B-AWQ"
         allow_cpu_offload: false
         device_map: cuda:0
+        trust_remote_code: true
 
     dflash:
         target:
@@ -42,6 +43,7 @@ models:
             tokenizer_path: "${PROJECT_ROOT}/models/dflash/target/Qwen3-4B-AWQ"
             allow_cpu_offload: false
             device_map: cuda:0
+            trust_remote_code: true
 
         drafter:
             model_id: local-dflash-drafter
@@ -146,3 +148,74 @@ prompts:
     gsm8k_instruction: >-
         Compute using concise essential calculations. End with exactly one separate line in the form
         "Final answer: <result>" and then stop.
+
+protocol_profiles:
+    active: rec3
+    profiles:
+        rec3:
+            description: "REC-3 four-condition mock10 validation profile"
+            dataset: rec3_mock
+            artifact_directory: "${PROJECT_ROOT}/docs/artifacts/rec3-four-condition-mock10"
+            review_archive: "${PROJECT_ROOT}/docs/reviews/review-pack-rec3-protocol-four-conditions-mock10-final.tar.gz"
+            config_overrides:
+                prompts:
+                    system: "You are an information extraction assistant. Return only the requested output format."
+                runtime:
+                    max_new_tokens: 32
+                    temperature: 0.0
+                optimization:
+                    block_policy:
+                        mode: fixed
+                        fixed_block_size: 8
+            compression:
+                keep_rate: 0.5
+                min_context_tokens: 1
+                chunk_max_words: 180
+            prompt_contract:
+                question: "According to the FINAL APPROVED FACT, who is the owner, what is the approval code, and what exact quantity was approved?"
+                output_instruction: "Return exactly: Owner: <name>; Approval code: <code>; Quantity: <integer>"
+                strict_output_pattern: '^Owner: (?P<owner>[^;\r\n]+); Approval code: (?P<approval_code>[^;\r\n]+); Quantity: (?P<quantity>[0-9]+)$'
+                tolerant_field_pattern: 'Owner:\s*(?P<owner>[^;\r\n]+);\s*Approval code:\s*(?P<approval_code>[^;\r\n]+);\s*Quantity:\s*(?P<quantity>[0-9]+)'
+                distractor_template: "Meeting turn {turn}: unapproved proposal says owner Candidate-{candidate}, code ZX-{fixture_index}{turn_padded}, quantity {distractor_quantity}; this is a distractor."
+                evidence_template: "FINAL APPROVED FACT: the approved owner is {owner}; the approval code is {approval_code}; the exact approved quantity is {quantity}."
+            conditions:
+                - name: baseline-ar
+                  runtime_condition: baseline
+                  prompt_kind: original
+                - name: dflash-r1
+                  runtime_condition: dflash
+                  prompt_kind: original
+                - name: llmlingua-ar-r2
+                  runtime_condition: baseline
+                  prompt_kind: compressed
+                  reduction_reference_condition: baseline-ar
+                - name: cc-dflash-r2
+                  runtime_condition: dflash
+                  prompt_kind: compressed
+                  reduction_reference_condition: dflash-r1
+            parity_pairs:
+                - name: original_baseline_ar_vs_dflash_r1
+                  left: baseline-ar
+                  right: dflash-r1
+                - name: compressed_llmlingua_ar_r2_vs_cc_dflash_r2
+                  left: llmlingua-ar-r2
+                  right: cc-dflash-r2
+            hard_gates:
+                condition_success_rate: 1.0
+                pair_generated_token_parity_rate: 1.0
+                exact_field_quality_rate: 1.0
+                protected_input_rate: 1.0
+                metric_validity_rate: 1.0
+                max_oom_events: 0
+                dflash_peak_reserved_vram_gib: 6.0
+            fixtures:
+                - {turns: 16, evidence_position_fraction: 0.15, owner: Asha, approval_code: AP-701, quantity: '41'}
+                - {turns: 16, evidence_position_fraction: 0.15, owner: Binh, approval_code: AP-702, quantity: '58'}
+                - {turns: 20, evidence_position_fraction: 0.30, owner: Chen, approval_code: AP-703, quantity: '73'}
+                - {turns: 24, evidence_position_fraction: 0.45, owner: Dara, approval_code: AP-704, quantity: '89'}
+                - {turns: 28, evidence_position_fraction: 0.60, owner: Elena, approval_code: AP-705, quantity: '104'}
+                - {turns: 32, evidence_position_fraction: 0.75, owner: Farid, approval_code: AP-706, quantity: '126'}
+                - {turns: 30, evidence_position_fraction: 0.90, owner: Gia, approval_code: AP-707, quantity: '147'}
+                - {turns: 30, evidence_position_fraction: 1.00, owner: Hana, approval_code: AP-708, quantity: '168'}
+                - {turns: 18, evidence_position_fraction: 0.50, owner: Ivo, approval_code: AP-709, quantity: '193'}
+                - {turns: 32, evidence_position_fraction: 0.70, owner: Juno, approval_code: AP-710, quantity: '215'}
